title: MINT Museum Leaps Ahead in Visitor Engagement with bitHuman's AI Ambassador
summary: MINT Museum launched 'The Little Prince', billed as the world's first museum AI ambassador, powered by bitHuman to give visitors personalized, multilingual guidance and ticketing. The avatar runs on-premise on a single Mac Mini for low latency and data privacy.

title: Ivoclar Transforms Customer Care with Virtual Einstein's Multilingual Expertise
summary: Ivoclar, a global dental-solutions leader, deployed bitHuman's interactive 'Virtual Einstein' avatar to deliver 24/7 customer care across tradeshows, events, and online platforms, speaking 50+ languages and trained on Ivoclar's full product catalog.

title: NRF Transforms Conference Experience with 10 Virtual AI Guides at Retail's Big Show
summary: At NRF: Retail's Big Show in the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center, bitHuman deployed 10 AI-powered virtual conference guides as interactive information kiosks, helping thousands of attendees navigate the venue, find exhibitor booths, and get real-time session info.

title: Connect AI Agents to 5M+ Shopify Stores Instantly
summary: bitHuman natively supports Shopify's Storefront MCP, letting an expressive AI shopping-assistant avatar read live product catalogs, give recommendations, and manage carts in real time from just a store URL. Demonstrated live on the Hysses Shopify store.

title: Turn Any E-commerce Site into an Interactive Shopping Experience
summary: Using allbirds.com as the example, bitHuman turns an e-commerce site into a conversational shopping destination where an expressive AI avatar showcases sustainable footwear, explains materials, displays products visually, and guides customers through purchases in 50+ languages.

title: Transform Any Presentation into an Interactive Experience
summary: bitHuman turns an uploaded deck into an interactive AI presenter that walks through slides and answers questions in real time. Showcased with Uber's iconic pitch deck, the avatar lets viewers interrupt anytime to dive deeper into the business model or market opportunity.
